sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 85 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.1 & 11. 2. For orders on CMA No.540/2025. 3. For orders on CMA No.541/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 23.12.2025 Ms. Dil Khurram Shaheen, advocate holding brief for Mr. Nadeem Yaseen, advocate for the applicant. Per office note, this is a time barred reference application filed with 94 days delay. On the last date adjournment was sought on behalf of applicant’s counsel. Same is the case today. Today once again time is sought for no cogent justification whatsoever. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
